The '''Battle of Althir'''—the second battle to bear that name—was one of the last battles of the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. Occurring sometime between [[3962 BBY]] and [[3960 BBY]], the battle saw the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] forces under the command of the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] annihilate most of the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders's]] ground forces.<ref name="NEC" />
